THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALLAHAN, GREGORY K. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LA VITA E BELLA INC.
